name: Beijing Wandong Medical Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Wandong Medical Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacturing, and sale of medical diagnostic equipment. The company offers MRI solutions; radiological imaging solutions, including CT system, CGO series, DR system, DRF system, digital mammography, general and mobile X-ray, and C-arm equipment; and veterinary imaging solutions. It operates in approximately 70 countries worldwide. The company was formerly known as China Resources Wandong Medical Equipment Co., Ltd. The company was founded in 1955 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
